text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear a familiar voice while taking a stroll to clear
my mind.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, where'd it go? I can't find your bow
anywhere, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-it's all right, Urara... I can just buy a new one...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But you loved that bow, didn't you? It must be
precious to you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: We can't give up yet! No way!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Urara...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Don't worry! I'll find it no matter what! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hmm, It's not here either... Where could it be?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I join in on the search, and it starts to drizzle as
we split up to go look for it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I join in on the search, and it starts to drizzle as
we split up to go look for it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Rain?! It must be because I'm here... I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Urara, you don't have to look anymore... I'm sorry
for dragging you into this mess!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Why? What's wrong? We've still got plenty of
search left in us! Isn't that right, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Let's head back to the academy for now.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It's too early to quit!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: B-but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, it's not long before the drizzle turns
into a downpour.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm glad we found your bow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Unfortunately, we're all soaked to the bone.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I'm so sorry! This is all my fault!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why are you apologizing?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-because! I was the one who lost my bow, and
the rain must've been my fault too...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What?! You can make it rain?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: That's awesome! I love playing in the rain!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea you were the one who brought the
rain! Thanks, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-no, Urara! That's not what I meant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after their misunderstanding is resolved,
Rice Shower's troubled expression clears up,
thanks to Haru Urara.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: What?! But we're so close to finding it!
choice_data_list: I think the rain's going to get worse...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
A little rain won't hurt us! Besides, finding that
precious bow should be our top priority!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Urara, y-you'll catch a cold if you get all wet!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I don't want you to get sick because of me...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Awww... Fine, but we're picking up the search
again when the rain stops, okay? I mean it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The weather is clear the next day, so I go out to
search again and find Haru Urara and Rice Shower
already there.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I found your bow! It was over there!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank you, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she'd been searching for the bow since
dawn. It's clear just how much Haru Urara cares
for her friend.
